ng-add.description: Wire ngwr into the workspace — install peer deps, append `@use 'ngwr';` to global styles, and print next-steps for bootstrap providers.

icon-set.description: Scaffold a tree-shaken ngwr icon barrel file.

use.description: Add an `import { WrFoo } from 'ngwr/<subpath>';` line and splice WrFoo into the @Component imports array of a component file.
